description: Account in Judaeo-Arabic with alphanumerical figures and itemized labels such as "milk/ ḥalīb" that may date from the 16th-18th centuries (based on the paleography). On the right side of the recto the name Yiṣḥaq is mentioned on two occasions. The fragment is quite small but displays the inner crease of what was likely a bigger bifolium. Date: 16th c or later. MCD.
description_he: חשבון בערבית-יהודית עם נתונים אלפאנומריים; כולל 'חלב' (ח'ליב); כנראה מאות 16-18; מזכיר יצחק פעמיים; שבר קטן מדו-עלה גדול יותר
